name: OBSBOT Tiny SE AI-Powered HD PTZ Webcam
description: Add a powerful webcam to your remote, home, or conference room environment that can follow you around the room with the OBSBOT Tiny SE AI-Powered HD PTZ Webcam.

features.Key Features:: Compact HD USB/UVC 1080p PTZ Webcam | Built-In Adjustable Mount, Bottom Thread | Record & Stream with Computer | Zone, Human, Hand AI Tracking | Landscape/Portrait Modes, HDR Support | Fast USB-C 3.0 to USB-A Host Connection | Built-In Mics, 4x Digital Zoom | Control with TinyCam Software
